title: Arrange order on Chart widget in dashboard based on order of groups on board
excerpt: I have set up a chart widget on a dashboard. The bars are labeled by group name. I would like to have the order of the bars reflect the order of the groups on the board that the widget is pulling the data from. It seems …

posts.author: cp40 (Claire Phillippi)
posts.cookedHtml: I have set up a chart widget on a dashboard. The bars are labeled by group name. I would like to have the order of the bars reflect the order of the groups on the board that the widget is pulling the data from. It seems I can only order the bars based on the data of the items. Does anyone have any guidance on this?

posts.author: Marc1 (Marc Rosser)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Currently the order that will be used is the order of creation of those groups. Monday is working on allowing us to change the display order os groups within a chart, but they haven’t announced an ETA.

Regards

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
